fixtures.name: debugging stacks overlay when evidence branches
fixtures.prompt: Investigate a flaky integration test where the first probe still leaves two independent read-only questions across logs and several files, then challenge the current theory before changing code.
policy_reason_needles: Fix this bug
At least two independent read-only questions, hypotheses, or evidence gaps remain.

Do not exclude `scout-skeptic` solely because a primary workflow skill such as `systematic-debugging`, `research`, `verification-before-completion`, `review-prepare`, `review-repair`, or `pr-land` already applies.

fixtures.name: verification stacks overlay for risky closeout
fixtures.prompt: Before closeout, review a risky refactor for regression risk, missing tests, and contradictory evidence without editing files.
policy_reason_needles: read-only review pass before trusting a fix, explanation, or closeout claim
The main thread still has direct work, synthesis, or another verification step to do while the child agents run.

Do not exclude `scout-skeptic` solely because a primary workflow skill such as `systematic-debugging`, `research`, `verification-before-completion`, `review-prepare`, `review-repair`, or `pr-land` already applies.

fixtures.name: research stacks overlay when exploration would bloat context
fixtures.prompt: Research how the config, docs, and implementation interact across multiple files, and gather read-only evidence without flooding the main thread context.
policy_reason_needles: multiple files, questions, or evidence sources can be inspected in parallel
reduce context bloat
This skill commonly stacks with `systematic-debugging`, `research`, and `verification-before-completion`.

fixtures.name: implementation work routes to workspaces without explicit lane wording
fixtures.prompt: Implement a new feature in this repo and keep the work isolated so review and cleanup stay clean.
policy_reason_needles: "Implement this feature in this repo" -> load `workspaces` first so the work starts in an isolated `.workspaces/*` lane; if a saved `plan/1` is explicitly required, create or revise it from inside that active lane instead of leaving it in the primary checkout.
Start or resume non-read-only implementation work -> `workspaces`

fixtures.name: workspace lane setup is the default start for implementation work
fixtures.prompt: Resume a partially finished implementation task in this repo and continue in the matching isolated lane instead of starting over.
policy_reason_needles: Start or resume non-read-only implementation work -> `workspaces`
load `workspaces` first so each task gets its own isolated `.workspaces/*` lane

fixtures.name: workspace conflicts route to reconciliation
fixtures.prompt: Two .workspaces lanes now conflict and one surviving lane needs to absorb the donor lane before review can continue.
policy_reason_needles: Multiple `.workspaces/*` lanes conflict and one must survive -> `workspace-reconcile`
This conflict came from multiple `.workspaces/*` lanes

fixtures.name: pre-pr self review routes to review prepare
fixtures.prompt: Before opening the PR, self-review the actual diff, fix findings, rerun verification, and escalate if the churn still is not converging.
policy_reason_needles: Before creating or updating a PR, run the pre-PR self-review loop -> `review-prepare`
Before I open or refresh the PR, self-review this diff

fixtures.name: github review repair routes to review repair
fixtures.prompt: Repair unresolved PR review comments in-thread, rerun verification, validate whether the review findings are true, and resolve the fixed threads.
policy_reason_needles: When PR review comments arrive, validate them, repair verified issues, and resolve only verified fixes -> `review-repair`
These PR review comments need fixing and thread resolution

fixtures.name: merge readiness routes to pr land
fixtures.prompt: Check whether this PR is ready to land, sync it if the base is stale, and merge it without doing tracker closeout in the same step.
policy_reason_needles: When the PR may be mergeable, check readiness and land it without swallowing closeout -> `pr-land`
This PR may be ready to land

fixtures.name: single-file typo fix stays direct
fixtures.prompt: Fix a typo in one file after a short local probe confirms the issue.
policy_reason_needles: when a short local probe is not enough
A short local probe by the main thread will answer the question.

fixtures.name: one grep question stays direct
fixtures.prompt: Answer whether one function exists by grepping a single path.
policy_reason_needles: A short local probe by the main thread will answer the question.
The output would not materially change the next main-thread step.

fixtures.name: obvious one-file import error stays direct
fixtures.prompt: A build failure points to one missing import in a single file and there is no competing theory to investigate.
policy_reason_needles: Fix this bug
A short local probe by the main thread will answer the question.
The output would not materially change the next main-thread step.
